description_long: This cabinetry unit features a two-tiered design with a lower section comprising multiple cabinets and drawers, topped by a wide, speckled stone countertop. The upper section includes a series of cabinets and drawers flanking a central open wine rack, which can store numerous bottles horizontally. The cabinetry is finished in a light, neutral color with simple, clean lines and crown molding at the top for a classic touch. Metal bar pulls are present on all doors and drawers, providing a modern accent. The overall structure is robust and likely constructed from wood or engineered wood, with a stone or composite countertop for durability. This unit is designed to be floor-standing and would typically be found in kitchens, dining areas, or upscale urban environments such as wine bars or communal spaces.
description: A large, two-tiered floor-standing cabinetry unit with a stone countertop, multiple drawers and cabinets, and a central wine rack. Finished in a light color with metal bar pulls and crown molding.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinetry, showing a plain, flat surface with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_1: A side profile of the cabinetry, highlighting the depth of the countertop and the layered structure of the upper and lower sections.
description_view_2: The front view displays all functional elements: cabinets, drawers, a central wine rack, and metal bar pulls, as well as the stone countertop and crown molding.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, mirroring the depth and structure seen in view 1, with the countertop and cabinetry layers visible.
attribute_door_configuration: multiple doors and drawers with central open wine rack
